response.step_by_step_log: 1. Watched the video and identified the intro (00:00-00:14) and the performance (00:14-04:38). 2. Observed on-screen credits: Title 'Glitter Love', Lyricist/Composer 'Syamo.G'. Primary performer is 'Omaru Polka'. 3. Searched for lyrics using 'Glitter Love 尾丸ポルカ lyrics'. Search results returned unrelated songs. 4. Transcribed the lyrics from the on-screen display in the video to ensure accuracy and meet the 'full lyrics' requirement. 5. Constructed the JSON object with the scenes and transcribed lyrics.
response.global_summary: A live performance video featuring VTuber Omaru Polka and other Hololive members performing the song 'Glitter Love', with on-screen credits identifying the composer/lyricist as Syamo.G.

scenes.description: The video begins with a short introductory sequence with on-screen text credits.
The song 'Glitter Love' begins. Multiple Hololive performers dance and sing the song. The on-screen text provides song credits.
